name: Everolimus
summary: Rapalog mTOR inhibitor tracked here for older-adult immune-function trials that used vaccine response, respiratory infection, and T-cell exhaustion markers as human readouts.
mechanism_summary: Inhibits mTOR signaling; in the immune-rejuvenation evidence map the relevant claim is low-dose or intermittent TORC1 modulation aimed at improving older-adult vaccine response and antiviral immune programs, not chronic transplant-style immunosuppression.

open_questions: Whether older-adult vaccine-response improvements replicate across vaccines, seasons, and dosing schedules
Whether infection outcomes can be improved without chronic immunosuppression or metabolic adverse effects
Whether benefits reflect immune rejuvenation or narrower mTOR/TORC1 pharmacology
